Action - Interface in com.github.dakusui.actionunit
Defines interface of an action performed by ActionUnit runner.
action - Variable in class com.github.dakusui.actionunit.actions.Retry
 
action - Variable in class com.github.dakusui.actionunit.actions.TimeOut
 
Action.Synthesized - Interface in com.github.dakusui.actionunit
This interface is used to let path calculation know an action is synthesized by another and the creator action should be taken into account in the calculation, instead of itself.
Action.Visitor - Interface in com.github.dakusui.actionunit
A visitor of actions, in the style of the visitor design pattern.
Action.Visitor.Base - Class in com.github.dakusui.actionunit
 
ActionBase - Class in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.actions
A skeletal base class of all Actions.
ActionBase() - Constructor for class com.github.dakusui.actionunit.actions.ActionBase
 
ActionException - Exception in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.exceptions
Encapsulate a general Action error or warning.
ActionException(String) - Constructor for exception com.github.dakusui.actionunit.exceptions.ActionException
Creates a new ActionException with a given message.
ActionException(Throwable) - Constructor for exception com.github.dakusui.actionunit.exceptions.ActionException
Creates a new ActionException from an existing exception.
ActionException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception com.github.dakusui.actionunit.exceptions.ActionException
Creates a new ActionException from an existing exception.
ActionPrinter<W extends ActionPrinter.Writer> - Class in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors
A simple visitor that prints actions.
ActionPrinter(W) - Constructor for class com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors.ActionPrinter
Creates an object of this class.
ActionPrinter.Factory - Enum in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors
A factory class to create ActionPrinter objects.
ActionPrinter.Writer - Interface in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors
An interface that abstracts various destinations to which ActionPrinter's output goes.
ActionPrinter.Writer.Impl - Class in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors
 
ActionPrinter.Writer.Slf4J - Enum in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors
 
ActionPrinter.Writer.Std - Enum in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors
 
ActionRunner - Class in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors
A simple visitor that invokes actions.
ActionRunner(int) - Constructor for class com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors.ActionRunner
Creates an object of this class with DEFAULT_THREAD_POOL_SIZE.
ActionRunner() - Constructor for class com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors.ActionRunner
Creates an instance of this class.
ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation - Interface in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors
This interface is used to suppress path calculation, which is performed by ActionRunner.WithResult and its printer.
ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation.Composite - Class in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors
 
ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation.Concurrent - Class in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors
 
ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation.Sequential - Class in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors
A sequential action created by and run as a part of ForEach action.
ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation.With<U> - Class in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors
A "with" action created by and run as a part of ForEach action.
ActionRunner.Impl - Class in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors
A simple implementation of an ActionRunner.
ActionRunner.WithResult - Class in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors
 
ActionRunner.WithResult.Path - Class in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors
 
ActionRunner.WithResult.Result - Class in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors
 
ActionRunner.WithResult.Result.Code - Enum in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors
 
Actions - Enum in com.github.dakusui.actionunit
This class contains static utility methods that return objects of type Action.

ActionUnit - Class in com.github.dakusui.actionunit
The custom runner of ActionUnit.
ActionUnit(Class<?>) - Constructor for class com.github.dakusui.actionunit.ActionUnit
Only called reflectively.
ActionUnit.PerformWith - Annotation Type in com.github.dakusui.actionunit
An annotation to let ActionUnit know the target elements annotated by it provide actions executed by test methods.

Composite - Interface in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.actions
An interface to represent an action which executes its members.

A skeletal implementation for composite actions, such as Sequential.Impl or Concurrent.Base.
Composite.Factory - Interface in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.actions
 
Concurrent - Interface in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.actions
An interface that represents a sequence of actions to be executed concurrently.

Creates an action which runs given actions in a concurrent manner.

Sequential - Interface in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.actions
An interface that represents a sequence of actions to be executed one after another.

Creates an action which runs given actions in a sequential manner.
